title: Azurth Mod
description: A Small-ish Mod That Adds A Unique Set Of Tools That Can Be Upgraded, And Also A Few Blocks.
body:
The Azurth Mod is a new, relatively small mod made for 1.20.1 that adds new ores, blocks, tools, and even a new miniboss, ready to provide an interesting experience to your minecraft playthrough!

## **Features**
_(as of version 1.2.1)_

The Azurth Mod adds a load of new features!
- Azure is a new gem that can be found below y level 64, it has many uses, however the    main uses are…
- New armour: azure armour, a new armour set as strong as diamond!
- New tools and weapons: azure tools, sword, pickaxe, axe and dagger!
All of these tools (except from the dagger) can be upgraded into faster, more powerful versions of themselves using the azure upgrade, dropped by the azurth knight. The upgraded tools are.. azure greatsword, azure sledgehammer, azure battleaxe.
- New mob: Azurth knight, this mob can drop the azure dagger, and azure upgrade, along with some rotten flesh and jewellery. this mob can be found in the…
- New Structure: Azurth shrine, this structure spawns azurth knights.. And may have some secret treasure…
- Platinum is a new material also found below y level 64 it can be used to make…
- Jewellery is a new method to earn emeralds, it can be made using gold or platinum rings, along with a gem of choice, azure, emerald, diamond, amethyst and quartz and can be sold to the…
- New villager profession: jeweller, the jeweller is a villager type that cannot be found naturally in villages, instead, you have to make the new block the..
- Gem cutter
- Etherite - A New Ore Found Commonly In The End
- Etherite Block Types: Etherite Block, Etherite Bricks.
- Synth Z - A New Music Disc (Music Made By Me)
- Musician Villager - Sells Music Discs (Including Synth Z)
- Etherite Sword, A New Sword That Gives You A Speed Boost When Held

##
